help.accept_invite: Accept a camera sharing invitation by token
help.account: Show account info (feature flags, contracts, purchases)
help.desc:
📷  Bosch Smart Home Camera — standalone control tool  v{version}
    Full cloud API access: snapshots, live stream, events, camera controls.
help.epilog:
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Run WITHOUT arguments to open the interactive menu.
  Use '<command> --help' for per-command details.

  Examples:
    python3 bosch_camera.py                          # interactive menu
    python3 bosch_camera.py status
    python3 bosch_camera.py snapshot Garten
    python3 bosch_camera.py snapshot Garten --live
    python3 bosch_camera.py live Kamera --vlc
    python3 bosch_camera.py download Garten --clips-only --limit 20
    python3 bosch_camera.py privacy Garten on --minutes 30
    python3 bosch_camera.py pan Kamera right
    python3 bosch_camera.py pan Kamera 45
    python3 bosch_camera.py token fix
help.info: Full camera details + live stream URLs
help.live.go2rtc_binary: Path to go2rtc binary (default: search PATH)
help.live.webrtc: Start go2rtc + open WebRTC viewer (sub-second latency)
help.nvr.subcommand: BETA: motion-triggered local recording + optional SMB/NAS upload
help.pan: Get / set pan position (360° cameras only)
help.privacy_sound: Get / set privacy sound (chime on privacy toggle)
help.rules: Manage camera rules (time-based privacy / motion schedules)
help.shared: Show which cameras are shared with which friends
help.status: Show all cameras with ONLINE/OFFLINE status
help.test_local: Test LOCAL vs REMOTE stream connection
help.unread: Show unread event count per camera
help.watch: Watch for new events (polling or FCM push)
help.watch.auto_record: Auto-record motion-triggered MP4 clips to captures/<cam>/nvr/ (BETA)
help.watch.auto_snapshot: Auto-capture snapshot on rising motion edge; implies --track-motion
help.watch.nvr_segment_seconds: Segment length in seconds while motion stays active for --auto-record (default: 60, or nvr.max_duration/segment_seconds from config)
help.watch.quiet_secs: Seconds of quiet before declaring motion cleared (default: 30)
help.watch.track_motion: Track motion state with rising/falling edge transitions
input.local_ip: Local IP address (e.g. 192.168.1.100) — press Enter to skip:
input.paste_token: Paste Bearer token (or press Enter to exit):
menu.header: Bosch Smart Home Camera — main menu
menu.no_cameras: ⚠️   No cameras in config — choose option 12 to scan
nvr.upload.not_configured: [NVR] SMB not configured — add nvr.smb.* to bosch_config.json

cmd.snapshot_mjpeg.not_jpeg: ⚠️   Skipped — FFmpeg output is not a JPEG (got {hex}).
